merges.pr_title: fix(ci): gh pr list author field — unblock bot PR policy
merges.summary_vi: `PR Policy` workflow_dispatch used `gh pr list --json user`. GitHub CLI 2.86+ removed `user` field → job failed with `Unknown JSON field: "user"` → `policy` check red → bot chore/qa PRs stuck, auto-merge blocked.

merges.pr_title: hotfix: fix GitHub Pages 404s from missing /zola/ base path
merges.summary_vi: `config.toml` đã cấu hình đúng `base_url = "https://banhang-chogao.github.io/zola"` — sitemap, canonical, menu (`$BASE_URL`), RSS/Atom, breadcrumb, related posts, pagination đều generate URL đúng.
